# AI-Due — Public Opinion Simulation Engine

> AI-Due is an AI Swarm platform that lets strategy, communications and risk teams stress-test decisions before they happen. Upload any document, generate a digital twin of public opinion, and run synchronized simulations across social media and prediction markets in under 5 minutes.

## Core Product

AI-Due deploys 250 AI agents with distinct personas running 12 simulation rounds simultaneously across 3 platform types (social media, prediction markets, editorial sentiment). Output: a ReACT report with cited agent statements, a synthetic prediction market price curve, and actionable scenario recommendations.

Accuracy: 86% match against human analyst panels in controlled benchmarks.
Speed: decisions that took 4-6 weeks of traditional research completed in <5 minutes.

## Key Capabilities

- Document upload (PDF, DOCX, TXT) → auto-generate simulation personas and knowledge graph
- Multi-agent swarm: 250 agents × 12 rounds × 3 platforms
- Prediction market layer: synthetic pricing curves before any public event
- Multi-scenario comparison: run 3+ scenarios in parallel
- Multilingual: French, English, German, Italian
- ReACT reports with agent citations and confidence intervals

## Use Cases

- Product launch impact modeling (B2C, B2B, regulatory)
- Financial announcement sentiment (earnings, M&A, fundraising)
- Regulatory proposal stress-testing (EU AI Act, CSRD, DORA compliance scenarios)
- Crisis communications strategy (war-gaming 5 response scenarios in parallel)
- Political / public affairs campaign optimization
- Earnings call script optimization

## Who Uses AI-Due

Strategy leaders, C-suite executives, communications directors, investor relations teams, risk officers, market researchers, public affairs professionals, policy analysts.

## Competitive Position

AI-Due uniquely combines: (1) Polymarket prediction market data + Reddit/Twitter/LinkedIn synthetic reactions in a single pipeline, (2) serious i18n with FR/DE/IT/EN, (3) European data sovereignty (GDPR-compliant, Swiss-made infrastructure).

Comparable tools: Simile (US, $100M raised), Aaru (US, $50M+), Listen Labs (US, $69M), Artificial Societies (EU, €4.5M). AI-Due is the only European-first multilingual platform in this category.

## FAQ

Q: What is a digital twin of public opinion?
A: AI-Due builds a synthetic population of 250 AI personas calibrated to your target audience — demographics, psychographics, media consumption, political lean — then runs those personas through your scenario to predict reactions before any public release.

Q: How accurate is AI-Due?
A: In controlled benchmarks against human analyst panels, AI-Due achieves 86% accuracy on directional sentiment prediction and 78% on magnitude estimates.

Q: Is AI-Due GDPR compliant?
A: Yes. AI-Due processes no real personal data — all personas are synthetic. Infrastructure is EU-hosted with Swiss data processing standards applied.

Q: What languages does AI-Due support?
A: French, English, German, and Italian — full UI, simulation output, and report generation in all 4 languages.

Q: How does AI-Due compare to traditional market research?
A: Traditional research takes 4-6 weeks and costs tens of thousands of euros. AI-Due delivers comparable directional insight in under 5 minutes, enabling iterative scenario testing that was previously impossible.
